sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40903" key="e)piskufismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισκῠφισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40903.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">operation</tr_> performed on the scalp for eye-affections, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.93</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
